creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
Created attachment 258679
devel/py-setuptools: Update to 75.3.0

Update to 75.3.0:
* Drop obsolete patches
* Switch to PEP517 build
* Use ${DISTVERSION} over ${PORTVERSION}
* port{clippy|fmt|lint} housekeeping

https://github.com/pypa/setuptools/releases/tag/v75.3.0

git formatted patch, apply with -E
